suggestion.title: Suggestion
suggestion.description: A feedback, complaint, or idea submitted by a student or staff member

department.description: Department such as Computer Science, Engineering, etc.

level.description: Level or role, e.g., 100-400, Postgrad, Staff

category.description: Category of feedback: Suggestion, Complaint, Feedback, Idea

isAnonymous.description: True if the submitter chose anonymity

sentimentReasoning.description: Visual explanation for AI safety metrics

form.title: Custom Form
form.description: A dynamic feedback channel config created by an administrator

description.description: Guiding statement or description of the custom form

createdBy.description: Admin email associated with this custom form

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this custom form was created

email.description: Google email address of authorized admin

/suggestions/{suggestionId}.description: Collection of all submitted ideas, feedback, and complaints

/forms/{formId}.description: Custom administrator-created shareable feedback form configuration
